documentation.file_docstring: Credential type expected in auth-profiles.json for this profile id. - api_key: static provider API key - oauth: refreshable OAuth credentials (access+refresh+expires) - token: static bearer-style token (optionally expiring; no refresh)
inline_comments: Failure window for backoff counters (hours). If no failures occur within this window, counters reset. Default: 24.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: ui, api, auth
